risks.title: Flaky fix introduces a new race condition
risks.mitigation: Verify the fix passes 3+ consecutive runs. The fix should be structural (e.g., mock the worker import) not a timing workaround.

risks.title: Skip comments are inaccurate or misleading
risks.mitigation: Read the existing skip comment before deciding to add one. Don't add if already accurate.

candidates.issue: Flaky — ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND on scanner.js when worker spawns in parallel test run
candidates.action: Fix: isolate from parallel worker interference (mock or sequential)
Verify skip comment is accurate; add if missing

candidates.issue: 12 tests skipped — Pinecone API key dependency
candidates.action: Verify skip comment is accurate; add if missing
Verify skip comment is accurate; add if missing

dependencies: src/scanner/scanner.ts — scanCurrentElements function used in flaky test
src/scanner/scanner-worker.ts — parallel worker that fails to resolve scanner.js in test env

decision_records.decision: Treat all 30 describe.skip tests as known-gap, not failures
decision_records.rationale: All 3 skip blocks are describe.skip with clear infrastructure dependencies (Chroma, Pinecone, Ollama). They were intentionally skipped before WO-SELF-SCAN-GAP-REMEDIATION-001 and remain unchanged.

decision_records.decision: Target the 1 flaky test as the only fixable failure
decision_records.rationale: scanner-export.test.ts > should support recursive option fails intermittently due to a module resolution race in the parallel test runner. This is the only test that is not intentionally skipped.
